role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Analyzed the script and vocabulary of the sign ('DILARANG BUANG SAMPAH DISINI') to distinguish Indonesian from Malay.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Evaluated the tropical climate, vegetation density, and rural road infrastructure style.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Musa (banana) and Arecaceae (palms) and discussed their biogeographic relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Noted the specific text on the sign and the infrastructure standards (concrete gutters, fence posts).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized the visual cues (drainage style, fence aesthetics) to support the linguistic and regulatory findings.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All five agents correctly identified Indonesia as the primary candidate based on the visible sign and infrastructure. The tournament correctly used the linguistic evidence to resolve the final match against the Philippines.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately quoted the sign text visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the tropical vegetation and road type.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana and palm species.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the red fence posts and drainage.
